headline: Board Refresh And Planned Breakup Might Change The Case For Investing In Corteva (CTVA)
summary: Corteva’s recent annual meeting approved the addition of industry veterans Christopher Policinski and Jean-Marc Gilson to its board, while confirming a US$0.18 quarterly dividend payable on June 15, 2026, and progressing preparations to split into two separate companies later this year. The refreshed board, which now combines deep agriculture and chemicals experience, is being positioned specifically to oversee Corteva’s planned separation into “SpinCo” and “New Corteva,” a move that could...

headline: Is Corteva (CTVA) Still Attractive After A 30% One-Year Share Price Gain?
summary: If you are wondering whether Corteva at around US$80.85 offers good value today, it helps to step back from the share price and look at what the underlying business might be worth. The stock has posted a 1.3% return over the last 7 days, is down 5.4% over the past month, and shows returns of 19.3% year to date and 30.4% over the last year, which can change how investors think about both upside and risk. Recent coverage has focused on how Corteva is positioned within the agricultural inputs...
